enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable lossless-claw without uninstalling it

contextThreshold.label: Context Threshold
contextThreshold.help: Fraction of effective token budget that TRIGGERS compaction (default 0.60). Trigger threshold only — the sweep stopping point is configured separately via sweepTargetThreshold and the pressure tier ladder is in pressureTiers.

sweepTargetThreshold.label: Sweep Target Threshold
sweepTargetThreshold.help: Fraction of effective token budget that a SWEEP targets when it fires (default 0.50). Sweep mode only fires above sweepTriggerThreshold (default 0.91); below that, dispatched compaction targets contextThreshold instead.

sweepTriggerThreshold.label: Sweep Trigger Threshold
sweepTriggerThreshold.help: Fraction of effective token budget at which dispatched compaction switches into deep SWEEP mode (default 0.91). Below this, dispatches use the pressure-tier ladder (1/2/3 passes per dispatch by tier). Above this, dispatches run unlimited passes targeting sweepTargetThreshold.

pressureTiers.label: Pressure Tiers
pressureTiers.help: Ordered ladder of pressure ratios → maxPasses caps that govern dispatched compaction below sweepTriggerThreshold. Default: [{ratio:0.70,maxPasses:2},{ratio:0.80,maxPasses:3}] giving 1 pass at the trigger, 2 passes at 70%, 3 passes at 80%. Multi-pass amortizes prefix-cache invalidation across more reduction per dispatch.

incrementalMaxDepth.label: Incremental Max Depth
incrementalMaxDepth.help: How deep incremental compaction goes (0 = leaf only, -1 = unlimited)

freshTailCount.label: Fresh Tail Count
freshTailCount.help: Number of recent messages protected from compaction

freshTailMaxTokens.label: Fresh Tail Max Tokens
freshTailMaxTokens.help: Optional token cap for the protected fresh tail; the newest message is always preserved

promptAwareEviction.label: Prompt-Aware Eviction
promptAwareEviction.help: When enabled, budget-constrained assembly keeps older context by prompt relevance instead of pure chronology. This can improve recall under tight budgets, but it can also reduce provider prompt-cache hit rates because the preserved prefix changes as prompts change.

leafChunkTokens.label: Leaf Chunk Tokens
leafChunkTokens.help: Maximum source tokens per leaf compaction chunk before summarization

bootstrapMaxTokens.label: Bootstrap Max Tokens
bootstrapMaxTokens.help: Maximum raw parent-history tokens imported into a brand-new conversation bootstrap; oldest turns are dropped first

newSessionRetainDepth.label: New Session Retain Depth
newSessionRetainDepth.help: Context retained after /new (-1 keeps all context, 2 keeps d2+)

leafTargetTokens.label: Leaf Target Tokens
leafTargetTokens.help: Target token count for leaf summaries

condensedTargetTokens.label: Condensed Target Tokens
condensedTargetTokens.help: Target token count for condensed summaries

maxExpandTokens.label: Max Expand Tokens
maxExpandTokens.help: Token cap for lcm_expand_query expansion calls

leafMinFanout.label: Leaf Min Fanout
leafMinFanout.help: Minimum number of raw messages required before a leaf compaction pass runs

condensedMinFanout.label: Condensed Min Fanout
condensedMinFanout.help: Number of same-depth summaries required before condensation is attempted

condensedMinFanoutHard.label: Condensed Min Fanout Hard
condensedMinFanoutHard.help: Hard floor for condensation grouping during maintenance and repair flows

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to LCM SQLite database (default: <OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR>/lcm.db; falls back to ~/.openclaw/lcm.db)

databasePath.label: Database Path
databasePath.help: Path to LCM SQLite database (preferred key; alias of dbPath, default: <OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR>/lcm.db)

largeFilesDir.label: Large Files Directory
largeFilesDir.help: Directory for persisting large-file text payloads (default: <stateDir>/lcm-files). Uses OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR when set.

largeFilesDir.label: Large Files Directory
largeFilesDir.help: Directory for externalized large files and inline-image payloads (default: ~/.openclaw/lcm-files)

ignoreSessionPatterns.label: Ignored Sessions
ignoreSessionPatterns.help: Glob patterns for session keys to exclude from LCM storage

statelessSessionPatterns.label: Stateless Sessions
statelessSessionPatterns.help: Glob patterns for session keys that can read from LCM but never write to it

skipStatelessSessions.label: Skip Stateless Sessions
skipStatelessSessions.help: When enabled, matching stateless session keys skip LCM persistence and grant writes

largeFileThresholdTokens.label: Large File Threshold Tokens
largeFileThresholdTokens.help: Token threshold that routes text attachments into large-file summarization

summaryModel.label: Summary Model
summaryModel.help: Model override for LCM summarization (e.g., 'gpt-5.4' to reuse the session provider, or 'openai-resp/gpt-5.4' for a full cross-provider ref)

summaryProvider.label: Summary Provider
summaryProvider.help: Provider override used only when summaryModel is a bare model name (e.g., 'openai-resp')

delegationTimeoutMs.label: Delegation Timeout (ms)
delegationTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for delegated lcm_expand_query sub-agent completion before timing out

summaryTimeoutMs.label: Summary Timeout (ms)
summaryTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for a single model-backed LCM summarizer call before timing out

maxAssemblyTokenBudget.label: Max Assembly Token Budget
maxAssemblyTokenBudget.help: Hard ceiling for assembly token budget — caps runtime-provided and fallback budgets. Set for smaller context-window models (e.g., 30000 for 32k models)

summaryMaxOverageFactor.label: Summary Max Overage Factor
summaryMaxOverageFactor.help: Maximum allowed overage factor for summaries relative to target tokens (default 3). Summaries exceeding this are deterministically truncated.

customInstructions.label: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.help: Natural language instructions injected into all summarization prompts (e.g., formatting rules, tone control)

circuitBreakerThreshold.label: Circuit Breaker Threshold
circuitBreakerThreshold.help: Consecutive auth failures before the summarization circuit breaker trips

circuitBreakerCooldownMs.label: Circuit Breaker Cooldown (ms)
circuitBreakerCooldownMs.help: Cooldown before the summarization circuit breaker auto-resets

cacheAwareCompaction.enabled.label: Cache-Aware Compaction
cacheAwareCompaction.enabled.help: When enabled, hot prompt cache defers incremental compaction while cold cache allows bounded catch-up passes

cacheAwareCompaction.cacheTTLSeconds.label: Short Cache TTL (seconds)
cacheAwareCompaction.cacheTTLSeconds.help: Treat short-lived prompt-cache entries as hot for this many seconds before deferred compaction may rewrite the prompt

cacheAwareCompaction.maxColdCacheCatchup.label: Cold Cache Catch-Up Passes
cacheAwareCompaction.maxColdCacheCatchup.help: Maximum incremental leaf passes allowed in one maintenance cycle when prompt cache is cold

cacheAwareCompaction.hotCachePressureFac.label: Hot Cache Pressure Factor
cacheAwareCompaction.hotCachePressureFac.help: Multiplier applied to the hot-cache leaf trigger before raw-history pressure overrides cache preservation

cacheAwareCompaction.hotCacheBudgetHeadr.label: Hot Cache Budget Headroom
cacheAwareCompaction.hotCacheBudgetHeadr.help: Fraction of the real token budget that must remain free before hot-cache incremental compaction is skipped entirely

cacheAwareCompaction.coldCacheObservatio.label: Cold Cache Observation Threshold
cacheAwareCompaction.coldCacheObservatio.help: Consecutive cold observations required before non-explicit cache misses are treated as truly cold

dynamicLeafChunkTokens.enabled.label: Dynamic Leaf Chunk Tokens
dynamicLeafChunkTokens.enabled.help: When enabled, incremental compaction uses a larger working leaf chunk in busy sessions and keeps the static floor in quieter sessions

dynamicLeafChunkTokens.max.label: Dynamic Leaf Chunk Max
dynamicLeafChunkTokens.max.help: Maximum working leaf chunk target for dynamic incremental compaction. The static leafChunkTokens value remains the floor.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.help: IANA timezone used for summary timestamps

pruneHeartbeatOk.label: Prune HEARTBEAT_OK
pruneHeartbeatOk.help: Retroactively delete HEARTBEAT_OK turn cycles from LCM storage

transcriptGcEnabled.label: Transcript GC
transcriptGcEnabled.help: Enable transcript rewrite GC during maintain(); disabled by default

proactiveThresholdCompactionMode.label: Proactive Threshold Compaction Mode
proactiveThresholdCompactionMode.help: Choose deferred compaction debt by default or keep legacy inline proactive compaction

fallbackProviders.label: Fallback Providers
fallbackProviders.help: Explicit fallback provider/model pairs for compaction summarization (e.g., [{"provider": "anthropic", "model": "claude-haiku-4-5"}])

databasePath.description: Path to LCM SQLite database (preferred key; alias of dbPath, default: <OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR>/lcm.db)

largeFilesDir.description: Directory for persisting large-file text payloads (default: <OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR>/lcm-files)
